title: microsisymbrium lasiophyllum
intro: Microsisymbrium lasiophyllum, also known as hairy rock-cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Microsisymbrium lasiophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. Microsisymbrium lasiophyllum can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by making a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
